entry.title: Re: Action Required: Apple Push Notification Service Serv...
entry.content: @sergiogj1998 I checked with our engineering on this. Mobile Service already includes the new root certificate used by Apple and there is no action required from your end.

entry.title: @Ayesha_Mulla, did you find a resolution? Hide Current vs Expected Rating in CDP when adding learnin
entry.content: Hide Current vs Expected Rating in CDP when adding learning by competencies

entry.title: Insert Issue in Groovy script within Json Loop
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to loop json payload and execute Hana sql query in order to insert record into Hana DB. 

Its inserting only one record and breaks the loop. If i change the Json attribute(subscriptionactiontype) by keeping execute query outside loop, then loop is getting executed as many lines as we have. No Issues at all. But if i keep execute query statement within a loop, loop is getting executed for only once . Pls suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)
entry.content: Interested

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting Started with Machine Learning and the Vector Engine using SAP HANA (Bangalore, Indi
entry.content: Interested

entry.title: Spot Award-how to get Nominator and Award Recipient's Org Unit as Point-in-time of the Request date?
entry.content: We are getting ready to implement the Spot Award in May 2025. When I tested the employee employment Organizational data (Division and Department), once employees moved from one org to another, the Division and Department data in Nominator and Award Recipient also updated to the most recent. I want to use the Division and Department on the employee on the request date (point in time) is that possible to config in the system? The budget is correct, it comes out from the correct Division (Previous employment) but the employee was not seating in the previous division.

entry.title: Re: How to get Header value from Datastore
entry.content: Hi, I have the same problem with select operation but if I using Get operation I'm receiving this error "No identifier provided in header SapDataStoreId for GET operation" where is necessary inform this header parameter SapDataStoreId to get the header values from datastore? Thanks in advance Regards

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content: Great insights into the time slice feature and its impact on data migration efficiency. A valuable read for anyone planning a move to SAP S/4HANA.

entry.title: Re: API that can get Cost Center and Manager fields by querying with worker's email
entry.content: Thanks for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Adjusted Transport Supply is not getting fulf...
entry.content:
Hi,

if the optimizer retains some inventory to fulfill later pseudo-hard constraints, there must be some cost benefit to do this. E.g. inventory targets or SDOS. You can try using numerical pre-optimization. In the pre-solve step such secondary costs aren't considered.

Best regards, Carsten

entry.title: Re: Change of bank key in banks and house bank
entry.content: Thanks for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Select query Issue on HANA Cloud Replicated table from S/4
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement: Replicate the S/4 table into Hana Cloud and query the record from Iflow-Groovy script and modify the Json payload

(1) I did replicate on prem(S/4) table into Hana cloud.

(2) Query is working in SQL Console.

(3) I did small test via JDBC which is getting me a result what i need.

PostMan:

(4) When i implement the same query via Groovy script, its not working as expected.

(5) Groovy script:

(6) PostMan result:

Attribute value is not getting modified. Apparently query is not getting executed. Pls suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content: Congratulations to the winner! 👏

entry.title: SAPHILA 2025
entry.content:
Transcend Beyond Boundaries

To transcend is to break through traditional limits and explore new frontiers.

SAPHILA is a premier, biennial conference by the African SAP User Group (AFSUG), in collaboration with SAP Southern Africa. Held at the iconic Sun City Resort & Convention Centre, SAPHILA 2025 is where the SAP user community gathers to connect, innovate, and grow.

Join a powerful network of leaders, from CIOs and CEOs to IT professionals and SAP experts and experience the latest in SAP’s transformative technologies. Get the tools you need to drive cloud transformation, optimize business processes, and stay ahead in today’s fast-paced landscape.

Registration: https://www.saphila2025.com/event/e7ac1636-637a-4aa2-bf29-ffcb7f8f0053/about-saphila

Manoj Patil

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed

entry.title: Unable to enable KeyUserExtensibility on Dev Tenant
entry.content:
We would like to setup a communication setup to deploy custom extension UI5 application to Dev Tenant.


Please note we have 3-tier environment 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to enable KeyUserExtensibility on Dev Tenant
entry.content:
Hello Sidhartha Mudrakola,

For 3SL customer key user extensibility available only in customizing tenant, You can not enable the key user extensibility in development tenant

For more info, You can refer the below KBA

3342103 - Key User Extensibility apps are not available or read only - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me

 

You can not setup a communication setup to deploy custom extension UI5 application in Development Tenant.

For more information about creating a Custom UI, please follow the documentation under:

  • UI Development
  • Develop an SAP Fiori Application UI and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Business Application Studio
  • Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment
  • Consuming Services in a UI

For more info, You can refer the below KBA

3399748 - You do not have start authorization for R3TR IWSV XXXXXXXXXX 0001, return code4 - Developer Extensibility - SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me

 

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: MSME number in vendor Master
entry.content:
Did you already look for

  • OSS notes such as 3045574 - India: MSME Classification for Vendors 
  • SAP answers to customer influence for MSME

NB: Put a correct tag (related to India localization) to get better answers 🙂

entry.title: Implement Quick View in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm trying to implement a Quick View for a data reference as described in Fiori Feature Showcase example.

So, I created the CDS with UI.facet for QUICK_VIEW:

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'Practitioner'

define root view entity /RHP/I_Practitioner
  as select from /RHP/R_PractitionerTP

{

@UI.facet: [ { type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
                      label: 'Pracitioner'
                      targetQualifier: 'QuickViewCard',
                      purpose: #QUICK_VIEW } ]

@ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'FullName' ]
key PractitionerUUID,

@UI.fieldGroup [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 10 } ]
FullName,

@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 40 } ]
_PractitionerRoleStandard.IsDoctor,

@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 50 } ]
_PractitionerRoleStandard.IsNurse,

@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 60 } ]
_PractitionerRoleStandard.IsPharmacist

}

In the projection view I created the association as foreign key

define view entity /RHP/C_PatientPractitionerTP
  as projection on /RHP/R_PatientPractitionerTP
  association of one to one /RHP/I_Practitioner as _Practitioner on $projection.PractitionerUUID = _Practitioner.PractitionerUUID
{

  key UUID,

      PatientUUID,

      @Consumption.semanticObject: 'Practitioner'

      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ { entity:            { name:    '/RHP/C_PractitionerVH',
                                                                 element: 'PractitionerUUID' },
                                            additionalBinding: [ { localConstant: 'X',
                                                                   element:       'IsDoctor',
                                                                   usage:         #FILTER } ] } ]
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_Practitioner'
      PractitionerUUID,

      CreatedBy,

      CreatedAt,

      LastChangedBy,

      LastChangedAt,

      EtagMaster,

      /* Associations */
      _Patient : redirected to parent /RHP/C_PatientTP,
      _Practitioner

}

In the application, the link is enabled but the quick view shows as "No details available"

Any clue of what I forgot?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Error code 440 in sap cpi?
entry.content:
Hi Swaminadh,

Can you provide more details regarding the error message? The error code number on its own is not enough information.

Regards,
Ian
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: API_PRODUCT_SRV not creating the Purchasing View
entry.content:
Hi @Thandi ,

The API you are using is correct, but the payload format does not match the schema. I have provided a sample schema below. Modify your schema (only plant data) and try uploading it again, this will create the purchasing view.

"to_Plant": {
"results": [
               {
                 "Plant": "XXXX",
                 "PurchasingGroup": "XXXX",
                 "ProfitCenter": "",
                 "ConsumptionTaxCtrlCode": "85011011"
              }
       ]
}

entry.title: Please provide samples reports for the monthly and yearly for With-holding Tax in S4 Public Cloud
Please provide sample for the monthly and quarterly reports for Late Payment interest and penalties
Change properties of Attachment Component on Create Maintenance Request [F1511A] via Adaptation
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I am trying to update the properties of the Attachment Reuse Component that is included on the standard Create Maintenance Request application. I want to update the flavor to "withCheckin" and remove the "Add a Link" action. I have created an adaptation project in BAS and I have tried the following: 

  • Creating an extension controller, attaching onto an event, getting the component, and attempting to change the properties. 
  • Adding a change to the manifest app variant.

Unfortunately, I have had no luck. I can technically update the properties of the component via the extension controller, but my changes are overridden once the component entirely loads in. If I could find a way to set the properties after the component is entirely loaded in then that would work. 

Another option is adding a change to the manifest app variant. I was able to successfully do this on "My Maintenance Requests" but that's much more straight forward since its a true Fiori elements application. 

Example of what I am trying to accomplish:

entry.title: Re: Error returning creation data in RAP managed with save unmanaged
entry.content: So, WAIT UP TO 10 SECONDS doesn't work better than WAIT UP TO 1 SECONDS. I just wanted to be sure that the asynchronous call ends before "SELECT message FROM zfh_t_log is" executed.

entry.title: How to write the formula in Bus rule where the notice PD is >6 months even for 6months and 1 day?
entry.content:
We have a requirement to put in place where the notice period duration for a country is 1 month if the employee tenure/duration in the company is more than 6 months, ie 6 months and 1 day also. If tenure is less than 6 months into the organization, then the notice period should be 1 week.
While using the predefined function "get the number of months between start and end dates", where my start date is hire date and end date is current date, then the function behaves like if the tenure in company is equal to 6 or <6 months then the notice period is picked up as defined ie. 1 week.

 

When the duration is more than 6 months, then the function will consider the 1 month notice period only if the month has passed. Ex: if tenure is 6 months and 5 days, then the function picks up the 1 week condition. If the tenure is 7 months (post 6 months), then it considers the current condition or 1 month condition. 

now my problem is, even if the tenure is 6 months and 2 days, the 1 month condition should be picked up and not 1 week. 

Request anyone to help me on this issue. Business people are surprised on listening to the way SF is calculating the number of months. We should have an option to input decimal value also in Business rule similar to number. Kindly help if anyone has been able to implement similar requirement.

Regards,

Nagavalli B n

entry.title: BP role creation Reconciliation acct : Is a required entry field".
entry.content: Hello all, I am facing an issue while trying to crate a BP Role under Supplier Fin Accounting. Even after entering the data in the Reconciliation acct, when I try to save, I am unable to save and it gives me an error "Reconciliation acct : Is a required entry field". Please help me how resolve the issue.

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2502
entry.content:
With the latest release for SAP Central Business Configuration, exciting new features are available. This blog post will provide you with a comprehensive overview of these features.

Support of the Retail Industry

We’re thrilled to announce that SAP Central Business Configuration now supports the retail industry. In the Define Scope app, you can include retail-specific scope. Then, in the Set Up Organizational Structure app, you can create retail-specific organizational units. Finally, during the Product-Specific Configuration phase, you can adapt the retail-specific configuration settings. This allows you to leverage retail-specific business processes and tailor them to your requirements.

Retail-specific organizational units in the Set Up Organizational Structure app

Enhanced Clarity for Deployment and Activation

Next up, we have an update in the Deployment Target app. Here, we've separated the Deployment Status column into two separate columns for better clarity: Deployment Status and Activation Status. This change allows you to easily understand the current status of the deployment and the activation individually, enhancing transparency.

New columns in the Deployment Target app

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2502. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have an idea on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence portal to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: Re: Determination of the newest = latest record for non-effective dated objects

entry.title: Re: Testing of S/4HANA Financial Planning Data ODATA APIs via SAP API Hub

entry.title: Re: SUBMIT rfitemgl problem
entry.content: As a solution, I did a select before doing the 'submit' and if I don't find it, I won't even do the 'submit'.

entry.title: Re: Application preview in VS Code vs Deploy to ABAP
entry.content: Hi - I checked the Metadata and even though I have provided annotation for foreignkey and created associations, the common value help is not there in the metadata. Why?

entry.title: Re: Duplicate plan order orders for same sales order line...
entry.content:
Hello

I don't think we can help you to find the root cause of the issue at this point. 

As I mentioned, the most common cause for the issue is the rescheduling check, but we cannot know for sure if this is the case just by looking into the orders already created.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Monitoring Service Key Expiration which are under BTP instance related to cloud foundry
entry.content: Need help to setup alert for BTP instances  service keys expire related to cloud foundry

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps
entry.content: any help please

entry.title: Where to start as a total newcomer to SAP.
entry.content:
Hello everyone, first of all sorry if I'm posting this somewhere I shouldn't but I really need some guidance here.

Before creating missunderstandings I have to point out I've been through some rough years mentally and I'm just starting to be able to fight with it so I still struggle a bit with being consistent by myself.

That said, I've had a chat with a irl friend working on lindedln, basically told me that S4 Hana HCM is one of the most requested profiles that most enterprises look for, and there's almost no people that studied that so there's even less people that can teach from scratch.

I've been struggling because I can't seem to find a course (free or not idc) that actually teaches me how to work as a HCM SAP consultant, so I've seen tons of youtube videos, tutorials on how to manage positions, workers, pays, days off, role switches, etc etc. But I can't seem to find an official course that can teach me from 0 to "hired" to say it easily, I've seen even other ERP's, I'm a IT technician so I have kind of a base and slightly worked with Databases before, still, Idk whats my entry point, what points to follow and what to exactly study to become a SAP HCM consultant.

I mentioned my mental situtation first because i know there can be people that just decided to smack some youtube tutorials and had the will to learn by themselves in 2 months, but I've been struggling to even find a way to practice, and even worse, a way to prove that I'm capable in that ambit.

Long story short, could anyone please guide me on what to do, what to study, how to test myself and how to eventually make a living out of it? Needed prerequisites/courses/webpages/tutorials/specific things, everything is going to be well received by me!
Thank you truly,
Axel.

entry.title: Re: Error returning creation data in RAP managed with save unmanaged
entry.content: Did you solve it? I have the same problem.

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps. Try again.
entry.content: Facing the same issue...

entry.title: Re: Exploring the Potential of SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: zero-copy data integration is great addition!! SAP Databricks on Azure will definitely rock.

entry.title: BW4HANA Open ODS view - master data
entry.content:
Hi all,

how does the Open ODS view for master data work? We are trying to use it as a time-dependet infoobject. But here is the problem. The valid period is set by time-stamp fields. When we asociate this Open ODS view with Open ODS view facts it shows empty values for the infoobject. As soon as we move the valid period fields from valid period folder to characteristics folder (aka attributes), data is showing. I tried to find something on the net, but there is not much info about it. I found only this:

  • Key date-based access to time-dependent master data is not supported in the Open ODS views

I dont understand this. How is it not supported? What is the point of having a valid period folder in the open ods view for master data? How does it work? Can anyone explain it? Maybe the time-stamp field is the problem? And we should change it to calday?

Best regards,

Martin Zluky

entry.title: GL transactional data mass reset/reverse for 1 company code
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

Our customer would like to re-migrate one of their companies  for both set of books - local & group. Is there any function that you can provide to mass reset/reverse the transactional data for all postings made to this specific company code?


Best regards,
PERSON_NAME 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: GL transactional data mass reset/reverse for 1 compan...
entry.content:
No, SAP Business ByDesign does not provide a standard function to mass reset or reverse all transactional data for a specific company code.

However, individual transactions can be reversed manually

entry.title: Re: Would i able to do stay certified assessment by purch...
entry.content: Dear Margit, Thank you for your assistance. I have a follow-up question regarding the Partner Learning Hub subscription our company is planning to purchase. Once we are connected to the designated learning bucket, will we have access to self-assessment tools and resources within the platform? Thank you for your clarification.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud: Unifying Enterprise Data for Next-Generation Insights
entry.content: Good to know! Datasphere will be there!

entry.title: AO connection to HANA direct ODBC connection
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

Is there an issue with this supported solution of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (AO) connection to HANA using direct ODBC (Type: Direct Connection) connection? AO export to excel and then if a reporting tool like Power BI is used I assume the note here is relevant 3255746 - Unpermitted usage of ODP Data Replication APIs - SAP for Me.?  

assumption:

  1. is this is not live data when the query is run to pull new data.  
  2. it is using 'The plug-in called SAP HANA EPM-MDS component (previously also known under the terms InformationAccess (InA) or MultiDimensional Services (MDS)))
  3. the way to go would be to have a solution with SAP Analytics Cloud Connection, and configuration of SAC with Live Data Connections and have AO pull real-time data through this connection. License would require to be converted from basic? to SAP Analytics Cloud for Business Intelligence (BI),

     

    • For more see SAP Note 2885389 Note 2885389 SAP Note 2294147. This would also require converting license from 'Basic SAP Analytics Cloud which is pre-requisite for AO' to 'sap analytics cloud for business intelligence, public system option'. 

We do not have BW system, and runtime DB license.

 Defining connections to SAP HANA | SAP Help Portal. 

Defining connections to SAP Analytics Cloud | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Does SAP Kernel 753PL1436 addresses the vulnerabilities of SAP Note 3537476?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, SAP Kernel 753PL1436 will already contain the correction instructions of SAP Note 3537476.

For more details, please refer to SAP Note 3549556 - FAQ for Security Note 3537476 / Error Create failed during internal communication.

 

Best regards;

entry.title: Re: Map the database table data to Purchase Order JSON format
entry.content: Did you find out how to remove the square brackets?

entry.title: Work permit alert expiration rule issue
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I was trying to create a business rule to trigger an alert notification and send an email to inform HR that an employee’s Work Permit in Singapore will expire in 30 days and 60 days.

For this purpose, I created the following rule:

However, after reviewing the workflow and the alert message, HR only receives the alert when the Work Permit expiration date is two months before. The second condition for 30 days is being skipped.
In Manage Alerts & Notifications, the 30-day alert remains pending.

I tried a different approach, and my concern is whether this approach is correct, using a date plus condition in the "IF" clause:



With this second approach, HR receives both alerts for 30 days and 60 days, and the alert creation date and alert effective date remain the same (as of today, during testing).

Could you please provide your expertise and guidance?

Thank you!

entry.title: Request for Mass Upload of Journal Entries from Excel for Multiple Companies
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We need to know if there is a way to upload journal entries in bulk via an Excel file for multiple companies. Due to the nature of our business, we manually process many journal entries through files, and we currently have to prepare a separate template for each company (we manage over companies). We would need to be able to post journal entries for several companies at once using an Excel template.

Is there any way to achieve this?

Thank you very much for your assistance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for Mass Upload of Journal Entries from Excel...
entry.content: Thank you for your inquiry. In SAP Business ByDesign, journal entries can be uploaded in bulk via Microsoft Excel templates, but currently, the standard system requires separate templates for each company. There is no standard functionality to post journal entries for multiple companies at once using a single Excel file.    Regards

entry.title: Re: Set up Outlook Integration for Interview Scheduling in Test instance and PRD instance
entry.content:
Hi Samatha,

Just wondering if you got any feedback or if you solve this escenario.

entry.title: Where can I find the results of the CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY query in SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

After executing this query for consistency check:

CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY ('CHECK', 'NULL', 'NULL');

Where can I find the result of the query? from where I can analyze it? does it create trace file?

In what format the output will generate for this?

Please let me know where can I find the result for this.

Thank you in Advance!

 

Best Regards,

Shruti

entry.title: MEASUREMENT POINT MAINTENANCE PLAN DUE BASED ON LAST COMPLETION
entry.content:
We have maintenance plans set up to generate a PM based on a counter reading. 

MP1 - Weekly hour meter reading for counter 1 is entered. 

MP2 - PM generated for equipment every 800 hours based on counter 1. 

At 800 hours MP2 generates a PM for the technician to service the equipment. However, based on equipment availability and scheduling the equipment has 850 hours when the service is completed. 

Is it possible to add a measurement reading to MP2 for hour meter reading once service is completed so that MP2 next service would be at 1650 hours instead of 1600?

entry.title: Inscrições abertas!
entry.content:

entry.title: querying compound employee API for manager name
entry.content:
I am trying to query an employee`s manager`s name from SF compound API, i am using SAP CPI for the integration, i am trying to do this without adding an enrichment call. I was reading up the SF compound employee API and i found this in the latest document

" A common use case here is to query data of the employees' managers. Use the
associated_employee_information segment to get the managers along with the employees, instead of
querying this data separately "

Has anyone ever done this, This will reduce the number of calls needing to be made to SF Hugely, if any example can be provided for this would be great.

Thank you.

entry.title: Custom Adapter Module with Build Path External JAR
entry.content:
Hello experts,

My scenario:

Development Infrastructure
  Software Component
    Development Component
      EAR (Referenced Projects: My EJB localdevelopment)
      EJB

The custom module logic (validating the XML before it is processed) was created separately and was added as an external JAR in the EJB localdevelopment Project.

My current module class dont have compilation Errors (Syntax Errors) but Build errors when Build gets executed.

The error import classes are those from my external JAR:

As far as I have been able to find out, setting the Build Path is not enough.

Im not sure but Im think there are 2 ways to resolve this: 

- Create an External Library project:

Source: Using External Libraries for Development with NWDI 

The above approach Using Exteral Libraries I think need to be linked with the Deployment descriptors.

Deployment descriptors 

- I found another resource Referencing an External JAR File

Source: Referencing an External JAR

Questions:

Is this the only way to handle external libraries in an EJB or is there another way that is easier?

The following post make references in the application-j2ee-engine.xsd but I don't see that the person have created an External Library DC:

How to create SAP PI adapter modules in EJB 3.0 

What exactly should I do? So far, beyond referencing the EJB in the EAR at the time I create it, do I need to do anything else?

I have done the research, but I see different procedures, can someone help me decide how to achieve this?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Simplify User Administration in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi  @mfoeken 

I have read so many blogs and now I'm completely confused.

What is recommended for creating users and teams in cloud apps like SAC?

This is what I understand:

  • Teams should be created via IPS.
  • Dynamic user creation should be used (users are not provisioned through IPS).

How are users deleted then? What is the correct way to create and delete users in SAC?

Thank you very much.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: querying compound employee API for manager name
entry.content: i get that segment in the response from the query but it does not have the managers name !!

entry.title: How to hide Business partner description.
entry.content:
Dear All ,

I'm working for one of the Client where the BP number address details not to shown on the Business user and  only concern users are support to view the BP.

To acheive this, we have created BP authorisation group to view only specific set of Users , but the problem here is when we enter the BP number and click on start , it is showing  complte address detail which is not expected .

Can someone please guide me how to hide the description on BP screen highleted in below screenshot .

Thanks

Venkatesh Rampe

entry.title: Re: SAML SSO and User Management in SAC with SAP Identity Authentication Service
entry.content:
Hi @jmsrpp 

thank you for this blog !

I have one question regarding the provisioning of teams in SAC.

What is the best way to create teams in SAC when users are created via "Dynamic User Creation"?

What is the recommended process for deleting users, and can this be automated?

Thank you

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload Using RAP Application
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thanks for replying please find below my modified test code using ABAP2XLSX github repository but since still in background it is calling GUI_UPLOAD system is not allowing excel data to be even uploaded to system since it is a cloud system. Could you please share any particular method that can used within ABAP2XLSX repository to capture file data on cloud system.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF lty_excel_s,
             dummy    TYPE string,
             field    TYPE string,
             fieldtyp TYPE string,
             value    TYPE string,
             desc     TYPE string,
             dummy1   TYPE string,
             field1   TYPE string,
             fildtyp1 TYPE string,
             value1   TYPE string,
             desc1    TYPE string,
             dummy2   TYPE string,
             field2   TYPE string,
             fildtyp2 TYPE string,
             value2   TYPE string,
             desc3    TYPE string,
             dummy3   TYPE string,
             field3   TYPE string,
             fildtyp3 TYPE string,
             value3   TYPE string,
             desc4    TYPE string,
             dummy4   TYPE string,
             field4   TYPE string,
             fildtyp4 TYPE string,
             value4   TYPE string,
             desc6    TYPE string,
             dummy5   TYPE string,
             field5   TYPE string,
             fildtyp5 TYPE string,
             value5   TYPE string,
             dummy6   TYPE string,
             field6   TYPE string,
             fildtyp6 TYPE string,
             value6   TYPE string,
             desc9    TYPE string,
             dummy7   TYPE string,
             field7   TYPE string,
             fildtyp7 TYPE string,
             value7   TYPE string,
             desc17   TYPE string,
             dummy8   TYPE string,
             field8   TYPE string,
             fildtyp8 TYPE string,
             value8   TYPE string,
             desc38   TYPE string,
             dummy9   TYPE string,
             field9   TYPE string,
             fildtyp9 TYPE string,
             value9   TYPE string,
             desc39   TYPE string,
           END OF lty_excel_s.

    DATA: p_upfile TYPE string VALUE 'C:\Users\HP\Downloads\Attachment.xls'.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <lt_data> TYPE STANDARD TABLE.
    DATA: lo_reader    TYPE REF TO zif_excel_reader,
          lo_excel     TYPE REF TO zcl_excel,
          lo_worksheet TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_worksheet,
          lo_error     TYPE REF TO cx_root,
          lo_alv       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
          lv_max_col   TYPE zexcel_cell_column,
          lv_max_row   TYPE int4.

    DATA: lt_data1 TYPE TABLE OF lty_excel_s.

    TRY.
        CREATE OBJECT lo_reader TYPE zcl_excel_reader_2007.
        lo_excel = lo_reader->load_file(  p_upfile ).

        lo_worksheet = lo_excel->get_active_worksheet(  ).
        lv_max_col = lo_worksheet->get_highest_column(  ).
        lv_max_row = lo_worksheet->get_highest_row(  ).

        lo_worksheet->get_table(
          EXPORTING
            iv_skip_bottom_empty_rows = abap_true
            iv_max_col                = lv_max_col
            iv_max_row                = lv_max_row
          IMPORTING
            et_table                  = lt_data1 ).
    ENDTRY.

 Best Regards.

entry.title: Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace – Consistent User Experience (6 of 7)
entry.content:
Continuing along our exploration of "Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace over individual visibility platforms," we turn our attention to the often overlooked aspect of: "Maintain a Consistent and Personalized User Experience."

This aspect speaks to the fact that SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace is not only powerful tool, delivering logistics visibility in the context of the shipper’s business, but it also delivers a consistent, efficient, and flexible user experience that can be tailored to an individual’s needs.

Why is this important?  Because learning curves can be steep with other external systems – they present a risk unto themselves.  Change management is a key discipline for competitiveness, as companies adapt to new needs, new risks, and new market influences. 

Asking supply chain and logistics practitioners or senior leaders to leave their core environment to maneuver in a different system, even with single sign-on, can decrease efficiency and as well as impede time-sensitive and strategic decision making.

And why is this often overlooked?  Because we often focus on what is different when looking to improve, while taking for granted the value of consistency. 

When supply chain and logistics practitioners or senior leaders can stay in their zone, where logistics visibility such as predictive ETAs can be used in the context of their core business processes, efficiency and productivity increase and latency in risk management, issue response time, and strategic decisions falls away.  

By leveraging SAP’s core design for user interface, increasingly enhanced with AI, SAP ensures that practitioners and leaders alike gain the efficiency and insights to perform at their best.  In a competitive market, the best performing companies excel at change management. 

From a change management perspective, the aim is to add capability, not complexity.

Global manufacturing companies leverage a mix of cross-functional teams and domain experts, often spread across different locations and departments, each requiring access to specific logistics information relevant to their roles and objectives.  Distributed, matrixed teams introduce risks and challenges for system administration as well as process execution. 

Managing user access and permissions across multiple platforms can:

  • Increase complexity
  • Burden administration with low-value, time-consuming tasks
  • Lead to inconsistencies and security risks

Executing core processes that require the proverbial "swivel chair” between systems, internal and external, can:

  • Decrease efficiency
  • Limit productivity
  • Increase risk and issue response latency
  • Risk production schedules
  • Jeopardize customer satisfaction

When gaining logistics visibility capabilities, SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace mitigates these hazards by providing a single platform with consistent user access and role-based permissions based on SAP’s core user interface design. This means administrators can define user roles and grant appropriate access levels with a familiar process, ensuring that each team member sees only the information they need. This not only streamlines the user experience but also enhances data security and integrity.

Furthermore, team members and stakeholders, regardless of their department or function, can gain access to shipment tracking and predictive ETAs in the context of their core process – no need to venture into other systems or external portals.  User preferences, saved views and filters, and read-edit rights, for example, are native to the SAP landscape.  

A consistent and personalized user experience is vital for ensuring that logistics visibility capabilities are effectively adopted and utilized across an organization.  By providing a consistent, efficient, and flexible user interface along with role-based access controls, SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace empowers global manufacturers and distributors to streamline user management, enhance security, and create more efficient and productive operations.

Check out this three minute video to see how SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace fits into SAP’s suite of supply chain logistics solutions.  


Next up, our last topic, reason #7 to choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trac over individual visibility platforms: Tailor Your Tracking Process. 

Don’t miss this last installation, where the best is saved for last.  See how you can literally track any process with SAP’s solution.  And catch this last post to gather a few more ways to explore more about SAP’s track and trace capability.  

Check back here for the upcoming link or subscribe to SAP Business Network for Logistics on SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: FIORI Elements with ODATA V2: Side Effect not triggered
entry.content: your backend is pretty much stone age version, I really doubt it is going to work with latest fiori.

entry.title: How is propagated demand mean calculated in the upstream node?
entry.content:
Hello
I have configured and run the MEIO operator and I am struggling understanding how the SAP Integrated Business Planning for inventory has calculated the Propagated Demand Mean for the upstream node. The transportation lead time is set to 0 and PBR is set to 4

Can someone help me understand how the 5.076,6 is derived?

entry.title: How to create graduated totals for P&L in the Financial Statement Version
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am trying to create graduated totals for some P&L items in the FSV using transaction OB58, but I don’t know how to use the functionality correctly.

In the attached screenshot, I want to create a subtotal for Gross Income = Revenue - COGS.

Could you advise me on how to build graduated totals in this case so that I can properly display the subtotals?

Best regards,
Stefan

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content:
🎉 Thrilled to be a Devtoberfest winner! The challenges, late-night coding, and dedication paid off. Huge thanks to all participants and the SAP team for an incredible experience!

Excited to attend SAP TechEd in Berlin—can’t wait to connect, share ideas, and dive into the latest SAP innovations. See you at TechEd 2025! 🚀💡

 

Thanks,

Vishalakshmi.

entry.title: Unable to access BAS
entry.content:
Hello,

I am unable to access my BAS trial account. I am receiving the following error: "You do not have the necessary roles to access SAP Business Application Studio."

I was able to access the BAS portal, but suddenly, I am encountering the error mentioned above.

I have attached a screenshot showing the roles assigned to my account.

entry.title: Function module TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST in S4
entry.content:
We have a custom workflow process for approving/moving transports to PRD.
Once the WF is approved, a custom program ultimately calls FM TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST to execute the transport(s).
This has been working fine in ECC for years however, it does not work in our new S4 environment.
The first try failed with the screen shot message below.

We fixed that with these steps:
1. Turn off the component check for the system.
2. Set set the parameter SP_TRANS_SYNC=OFF in the system details in STMS.
3. Once that is set you will not have tp checking the component level of every transport request in queue and everything will work much faster. Also, this error will be gone since no checks will be performed against TMS queue entries.

Now, the FM returns a zero return code, but the transport is not moved.
Any ideas?

Thanks
Leo

entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to select some problematic suplliers and when Im posting an invoice frm these suppliers it should goes parked, can I do that?

entry.title: Re: Easy and efficient way of uploading pricing conditions in SAP system using a single exclusively
entry.content:

I'm struggling with some table conditions that have more than 50 characters. 

KONH-VAKEY is up to 100 but E1KOMG-VAKEY is just 50.

Does anyone can give me a hand? How to handle with it?

Thanks in advance!!!

entry.title: Re: SSO Error in SAC
entry.content:
Hello @dyaryura 

  thank you very much.

Does this mean that in this scenario with "Dynamic User Creation," the deletion of users in SAC must be done manually?

What about team creation?

Should teams in SAC be created manually or via IPS (Groups (Azure) -> SAC (Teams))?

I’ve read somewhere that manually created teams in SAC can no longer be accessed by IPS. I’m not sure if this is correct.

Many Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: How to open Custom fields tab in sales order (VA01/VA02)?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to do an enhancement which is in exit MOVE_TO_VBEP. I've added 3 Custom field 
Certificate, Valid from and Valid to. If we get data in Certificate field (VBAP-ZZ1_CERTIFICATE) We need to give warning and ask user to provide data in Valid from and Valid To and we need to open the Custom fields tab so that user can but those entries. How to make this possible. 

until now i tried

SET CURSOR FIELD VBAP-zz1_valid_from_sdi. - Did not work. 

SCREEN-NAME 'field' 
SCREEN-REQUIRED = 1. - Did not work

entry.title: Re: Hi, I am not able to subscribe to SAP Build Apps usin...
entry.content: Hello, Any update on this? Also, I am not able to access SAP Build work zone, it says "couldn’t find the site. Perhaps you don't have the required authorization to access it, or the site doesn't exist"
